title: senecio reicheanus
intro: Senecio reicheanus, also known as Reiche's ragwort, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to the Canary Islands. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Senecio reicheanus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat a range of ailments.
